turn_back_01.speaker: Inner Voice
turn_back_01.text:
You turn.
The street is the same.
But everything changed.

turn_back_02.speaker: Inner Voice
turn_back_02.text:
The neon sign is dark.
⌈YOU'RE STILL HERE⌋
but the light is gone.

turn_back_03.speaker: Inner Voice
turn_back_03.text:
The office door is locked.
From the outside.
You can't go home again.

turn_back_end.speaker: Narrator
turn_back_end.text:
You sit on the curb.
The rain falls.
The street is empty.
